response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development, including AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, which aligns well with the role's requirements. However, his resume lacks explicit mentions of GenAI-specific work (e.g., vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent systems) beyond the current Naver role. His background in cloud platforms (AWS) and TypeScript/Python is strong, but direct experience with AI system design and evaluation pipelines is not clearly demonstrated.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering background with leadership experience as a Staff Software Engineer
Direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP (Model Context Protocol) code generators
Proven ability to build scalable systems (e.g., low-latency apps, microservices infrastructure)
concerns: Limited explicit mention of GenAI-specific work (e.g., vector databases, RAG, multi-agent systems) beyond current role
No clear evidence of experience designing AI systems for production or building evaluation pipelines
Research-heavy roles (e.g., Tencent, Dunnhumby) may not fully align with the GenAI/cloud focus

key_factors.factor: Cloud platform (AWS/GCP/Azure) and AI system design
